app.title: Nur al-Hadith
app.subtitle: The Light of Prophetic Traditions
app.description: Explore the timeless wisdom of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ through authenticated hadith collections. Search, browse, and discover the treasures of Islamic scholarship.

speech.title: Speech Practice
speech.subtitle: Read the hadith aloud in Arabic and check your pronunciation
speech.searchPlaceholder: Search for a hadith to practice...
speech.recordingHint: Record yourself reading the hadith above
speech.free: Requires OpenAI API key. See .env.example for setup.
speech.browserInfo: 🎤 Audio is sent securely to OpenAI Whisper for transcription. Configure your API key in the .env.local file.

result.title: Practice Complete
result.subtitle: Keep practicing to improve your pronunciation

speech_recorder.instructions: Read the hadith above aloud in Arabic. The browser will listen and check your pronunciation.
speech_recorder.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected. Please try again.
speech_recorder.noMicrophone: Microphone not found. Please check your microphone.
speech_recorder.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access.
speech_recorder.langNotSupported: Arabic speech recognition is not supported on this browser. Try Chrome.
speech_recorder.browserNotSupported: Your browser doesn't support speech recognition. Use Chrome or Edge for this feature.
